    test_04_SortRenameElementAddAttribute()
    sort elements, rename elements, add attributes and load fixed Rodin file
    void
    test_05_createAndOpenFileWithVersion()
    When a new Rodin file is created, the correct current version must be assigned to it.
    void
    test_06_ConversionSequence()
    When necessary, a sequence of conversions must be carried out.
    void
    test_07_CannotConvertFromFutureVersion()
    If the version number of a file is higher than the current version number, conversion fails.
    void
    test_08_AddAttributeToRootNode()
    Check whether a version number is created if there is none initially and an attribute is added to the root node
    void
    test_09_SourceConversion()
    Basic function test for a source conversion: + creation of version number + change of version number + example of a conversion that is neither simple nor sorted
    void
    test_10_InvalidVersion()
    Test for a file containing an invalid version number.
    void
    test_11_ModifyAttribute()
    Test of the modification of the contents of an attribute.
    void
    test_12_ChangeName()
    Test of the modification of the name of an element.

      public void test_06_ConversionSequence() throws Exception
      When necessary, a sequence of conversions must be carried out. (This is a variant of test_04)
      Throws:
      Exception

    • test_07_CannotConvertFromFutureVersion

      public void test_07_CannotConvertFromFutureVersion() throws Exception
      If the version number of a file is higher than the current version number, conversion fails. The file must not be modified (even if the conversion result is accepted).
      Throws:
      Exception

    • test_08_AddAttributeToRootNode

      public void test_08_AddAttributeToRootNode() throws Exception

      Throws:
      Exception
